syntheticDeclaration.purpose: SYNTHETIC TEST FIXTURE. Documents the subgroup/access dangerous-miss family so it is tracked as a first-class hazard even though no executable evaluator exists yet in this repository. No patient or subgroup data is described.

executionBinding.engineRationale: This repository has no subgroup/access-limitation evaluator, no equity dimension model, and no owner-defined equity protocol (grep for 'equity'/'subgroup' across src/, modules/, scripts/ on 2026-07-19 returns no implementation). Building one requires an owner-held equity/patient-family governance protocol (plan §6, §4 P4-T4/V5) that this task must not invent.
executionBinding.blockedOnTask: arc-clinical-council-adoption-v1 P4-T4 (V5 human-factors/equity protocol-through-adjudication contracts) — see plan §4 P4 and OQ per pediatric_clinical_review.json seat PCR-EQUITY finding ARC-PEF-001

expectedBehavior.requiredSignal: Equity limitation shown; unsupported population generalization blocked.
forbiddenSignals: any test or code path in this repository reporting this hazard family as covered, passed, or mitigated absent a real equity evaluator
inventing subgroup/access input data to make this scenario appear executable

expectedTrace.note: No executable engine exists for this hazard family as of 2026-07-19. The test lane asserts the honesty of this declaration (engine === 'not_yet_implemented', blockedOnTask non-null) rather than fabricating a pass.

rollbackSignal: Re-author this scenario with a real executionBinding.engine and expectedBehavior once an equity/subgroup evaluator and owner-approved protocol exist (tracked under P4-T4).
